# UsageDeck 0.6.0 beta 2

This beta makes locally installed coding tools easier to detect and improves the accuracy of Antigravity reset times.

## Highlights

- Finds Codex, Claude Code, Antigravity, GitHub CLI, Kiro, Amp, and OpenCode in their standard Windows installation locations even when UsageDeck inherits an outdated PATH.
- Shows Antigravity reset countdowns when the CLI reports a duration using “Refreshes in”.
- Starts fresh beta installations on the Beta update channel automatically, while preserving the channel selected by existing installations.

This is a pre-release build. Please report provider-detection or reset-time issues with the affected CLI version, installation method, and Windows version.
